programmes.show_description: Jessie from GRS Towing has to transport an eight-tonne river boat across three states for a desperate oyster farmer who is relying on the boat to save her family's business.
Documentary series following truckers in Australia. Mark King has to haul a monster rig to a coal mine 700km away. Steve Grahame is stuck just 70km from his destination.
A 26-tonne tanker gets stuck in a waterlogged verge on the busy A5, fully loaded and leaning to one side. Plus, moving an ageing double decker bus that's been immobile for eight years.
Two coaches which tried passing each other on a narrow snowy lane come to grief, and a bin lorry stuck in mud is in danger of keeling over.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Documentary series following the crews who keep Britain moving when a big freeze strikes.
This episode kicks off with a pursuit of a drunk driver who's suspected to be armed with a knife. Interceptors Dan and Jim manage to track down the suspect.
This episode kicks off with a pursuit that pushes speeds of almost 150 miles an hour. Coups and the team get behind a high-performance Mercedes that speeds away.
Western. A reformed gambler turned preacher partnered with a pretty female fugitive outlaw runs into an old pal who's also a marshal, and they both fall for the same bad gal. (1949)

Western. A reformed gambler turned preacher partnered with a pretty female fugitive outlaw runs into an old pal who's also a marshal, and they both fall for the same bad gal. (1949)
Comedy western about a penniless outlaw who attempts a heist in a bid to acquire the wealth he needs to keep his fiancee. Director: Andrew V McClaglen.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Comedy western about a penniless outlaw who attempts a heist in a bid to acquire the wealth he needs to keep his fiancee. Director: Andrew V McClaglen.
A 50-tonne excavator needs collecting from a farm in Wales, but road closures hinder plans. And Nick and Oscar must move a life-size metal stegosaurus 25 miles to RHS Garden Wisley.
In Bradford there's a high-octane chase through a housing estate, and Yorkshire's back roads have their peace disturbed by two cars carrying gun-toting drug dealers.
Spike breaks out a drug wipe for a teenage tearaway on two wheels, but will the biker heed his dad's wise words?
Chris's tracker dog Ronny has a twitchy nose but will this canine crime fighter manage to track down a villain?
PC Will Hunter follows a suspected cloned car, but its driver refuses to do a breath test. And a pursuit hits dangerous speeds through rural villages.
The Glovers race to get their wood and machines off Erie Mountain before government road restrictions shut them down for spring. Craig's crew rush to get stranded wood off the landing.
A truck-killing river crossing traps the water drillers, cattle truckers David and Kylie battle a blown engine and vintage tractor trucker Mike Partridge makes a crucial wrong turn.
A young Londoner gets an exciting offer to work in his dad's bar in Thailand, but he discovers a world of temptation which he can't resist, breaking his father's golden rule.
The heaviest rainfall in 70 years sparks a flood emergency in NSW. Wagga Truck Towing rescue 360K dollars' worth of farm equipment and a semi-trailer that's jackknifed into a swamp.
Dougal Brett's road trains have to haul 1,500 cattle to a market nearly 3,000km away.
In Northumberland, Kevin's winching a tanker out of a muddy ditch. His load is leaning perilously close to an ancient wall and if gets the angle wrong, he might collapse the bricks.
Rescuing a burnt-out low loader and portacabin, a broken-down bus blocking a mini roundabout during the afternoon school run, and retrieving a car which has careered off the A6.

Documentary series following the crews who keep Britain moving when a big freeze strikes.
Mozza and Jonny pull a drink driver who's more than three times the legal limit at 4pm. And Phil's on the hunt for a runaway driver who vanishes into an estate.
Tonight's episode kicks off with a high-speed pursuit of an April fool driving a Vauxhall Meriva. A direct hit from Dan's X5 isn't enough to bring the runaway to a stop.
Classic western starring Joan Crawford and Sterling Hayden. A woman saloon keeper hires an old flame, once a feared gunfighter, to fend off a powerful neighbour. (1954)

Frontier adventure based on the true story of a bounty hunter, hired to tackle rustlers, whose unorthodox methods stir up trouble in a ranching community.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Frontier adventure based on the true story of a bounty hunter, hired to tackle rustlers, whose unorthodox methods stir up trouble in a ranching community.
Two titanic trucks are in Perth, Scotland to load and then deliver to a Highland holiday park two halves of a bespoke holiday lodge worth a whopping two hundred thousand pounds.
A driver nearly causes carnage to make sure his takeaway stays hot, a large cannabis stash is found at the scene of a crash, and a drunk driver gets caught short.
The interceptors make an early hour dash to catch a team of late night burglars and one of the suspects treats Liam to a face full of saliva.
For the first time, a pursuit is filmed from the suspect's perspective. Plus Liam and sniffer dog Louis help uncover 1/2m of class-A drugs.
The team joins forces with the chopper to track down a wanted criminal on a motorbike, and a young driver crashes straight into an unmarked police car.
Officers are called to a fight in a takeaway and four are arrested; a group of people abandon their car after a hit and run; bouncers are racially abused by passerby.
A woman makes a desperate attempt to frame her friend right in front of deputies. A driver's assortment of containers raises some questions.
Fleeing suspects risk their safety by hiding in a dangerous swamp. For one driver, a broken truck turns out to be the start of a very long list of problems.
Two small-time dealers are tempted by a Colombian cartel's danger and dollars, turning them into major importers - until one of the biggest busts in US history forces them to run.
